title: Esbee Dynamed opens Esbee Hive in Mumbai
summary: Esbee Dynamed has launched Esbee Hive, its new experience center in Mumbai; the first facility in India where hospital procurement teams can see, touch, and evaluate integrated Operating Room and […]
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
It is a hands-on experience center for operating room integration and digital CSSD solutions

Esbee Dynamed has launched Esbee Hive, its new experience center in Mumbai; the first facility in India where hospital procurement teams can see, touch, and evaluate integrated Operating Room and CSSD solutions in a working clinical environment rather than a boardroom.

The center is designed for stakeholders who actually make procurement decisions: surgeons, biomedical engineers, hospital administrators, Modular OT vendors, and hospital architects. Esbee Hive gives them a place to ask harder questions, run live demonstrations, and experience world-class healthcare solutions.

What visitors experience

The center features live demonstrations of the below platforms:

CREA: Digital OR integration system. Visitors can explore the full OR environment, including live case scheduling, audio-visual management, surgical recording, high-definition streaming, independent routing, multi-view displays, OR analytics, and an extended worklist.

CREA Unified Communications Platform (UCP)-Built for medical education

For medical colleges and teaching hospitals, the OR is also a classroom. CREA’s UCP streams live surgical procedures directly into seminar rooms, lecture halls, and auditoriums with tools for faculty annotation, real-time Q&A, bi-directional video conferencing, and a tagged media library for ongoing academic use. At Esbee Hive, medical college teams can see exactly how this works in a live clinical setup.

Pivot Smartflow (PSF)-Surgical Instrument Tracking and CSSD Workflow Automation: The center also runs live demonstrations of instrument scanning and full CSSD workflow management, giving sterilisation teams and hospital operations heads a ground-level look at how PSF tracks traceability from the CSSD to the OR and back.

Esbee Hive will also host regular workshops, seminars, and training sessions; functioning as a knowledge hub for hospital teams navigating decisions around OR digitisation, NABH compliance, and sterile processing.

Aditya Bawa, Co-Founder & Managing Director, Esbee Dynamed said, “We realised that the biggest barrier to adoption of good technology in Indian hospitals was not budget or awareness — it was belief. Esbee Hive was created to give clinical teams the confidence that comes only from experience. When you see it work, when you touch it, when you walk through it — the decision becomes clear.”

The larger context

India’s hospital sector is scaling fast. Large chains are expanding their multi-city footprints. Standalone 500-plus bed hospitals are upgrading their surgical infrastructure to meet rising standards of safety and precision. The modern Operating Theatre is no longer a standalone room; it is a connected environment where patient imaging, AV systems, surgical documentation, and instrument logistics need to work in sync.

Procurement decisions at this level carry real clinical stakes. Yet most hospitals continue to make them without experiencing the integrated environment first.

Esbee Hive is where that changes.

Book a Visit

Hospitals and partners interested in scheduling a live demonstration can reach the Esbee Hive team directly:
